reviews.comment:
La atencion no es mas la de antes, en Santa Fe. Excepto el.personal de la grúa de auxilio. Si hay que pensar en seguir siendo socios nos tenemos que conformar con eso y los hoteles como por ejemplo el de Córdoba capital. Los que trabajan para una empresa hacen la diferencia y lamentablemente ya se ha jubilado la gente que marcaba ésa distinción.

(Translated by Google)
The service in Santa Fe isn't what it used to be, except for the tow truck crew. If we're going to consider remaining members, we'll have to settle for that and hotels like the one in Córdoba. Those who work for a company make all the difference, and unfortunately, the people who made that difference have already retired.

reviewReply.comment:
Hola Alcira gracias por tu tiempo, te invitamos para que nos amplies los comentarios para poder mejorar.
Te esperamos.
Saludos

reviews.comment:
Excelente Todo, atención de los Dueños, personal , playeros, Excelente servicio de lavado y service para el automotor, ameno lugar para disfrutar de un desayuno/ almuerzo de calidad y precio acorde!! Gcias ACA santa fe!

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent: the owners, staff, and attendants were all wonderful. The car wash and service were superb, and it's a pleasant place to enjoy a quality breakfast/lunch at a reasonable price! Thanks, ACA Santa Fe!
